JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURIGIN, JULIE GALLAGHER, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 A 9TH AVE. $280.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $280.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-04-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. WILL PAY PLTF'S ATTY. $280.00 BY 11/30/94; WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 12/4/94, 12PM; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL).
